title: eryngium aloifolium
intro: Eryngium aloifolium, also known as the glaucous sea holly, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Eryngium aloifolium include soothing digestive issues, relieving respiratory problems, and reducing pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
